---
title: "Billboard Graphic"
execute:
  echo: false
---

```{r}
suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(tidyverse))
```

```{r}
billboard |>
  slice_min(wk1, n = 6, with_ties = FALSE) |>
  pivot_longer(
    starts_with("wk"),
    names_to = "week",
    values_to = "rank",
    values_drop_na = TRUE
  ) |>
  mutate(week = readr::parse_number(week)) |>
  ggplot(aes(x = week, y = rank, color = track, group = track)) +
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2, alpha = 0.9) +
  geom_point(size = 2.5) +
  scale_y_reverse(limits = c(100, 1), breaks = seq(100, 1, by = -20)) +
  scale_color_brewer(palette = "Dark2") +
  labs(
    title = "Chart Paths for the 1999 Billboard Top Tracks",
    subtitle = "Lower ranks mean a better position on the chart",
    x = "Week",
    y = "Chart rank",
    color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(color = "gray35"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    legend.position = "none"
  )
```
